selected_candidate: Extend CommandStatus with goal lease, checkpoint count, checkpoint freshness, and return-gate status, plus a stable fixture.
rejected_candidates: Only add a fixture without code; rejected because live command status did not expose the fields.
Add Command import routing now; rejected because node 41 owns Command compact import into route reconciliation.
Treat checkpoint freshness as a doctor-only concern; rejected because Command readback is the compact operator view.
decision_basis: Long-run operators need compact Command status to show whether the lease and checkpoint state are current before final response is considered.
